chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.T.A No.20 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on C.M.A No.2315/25. 2. For orders on C.M.A No.2316/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 10.11.2025 Mr. Safdar Ali Abro, Advocate for applicant. = 1. Urgent application stands disposed of. 2&3. Through the instant Civil Transfer Application, the applicant has assailed the order dated 30.09.2025 passed by the learned District Judge, Hyderabad whereby the application u/s 24 CPC seeking transfer of Execution Application No.06 of 2025 from the Court of Senior Civil Judge- III, Hyderabad to any other Court having jurisdiction, filed by the applicant was dismissed. Heard the arguments advanced by the learned counsel for the applicant and perused the material available on record. From a perusal of the record, it appears that the applicant has failed to show any substantial ground to justify the transfer of the case execution proceedings. None of the allegations raised against the Presiding Officer have been established by the applicant to indicate any relationship or biased approach towards the other side. The applicant’s assertions are merely presumptive, as nothing on record demonstrates any such relationship or bias on the part of the Presiding Officer. At the end, the learned counsel submitted that since there are several Senior Civil Judges, the case may be transferred to any other Judge for its expeditious disposal. I am afraid that on such flimsy and self- concocted grounds, cases should not be transferred from one Judge to another, and the transfer of cases cannot be left to the mercy, desire, or wishes of litigants.

At the end, the learned counsel submitted that since there are several Senior Civil Judges, the case may be transferred to any other Judge for its expeditious disposal. I am afraid that on such flimsy and self- concocted grounds, cases should not be transferred from one Judge to another, and the transfer of cases cannot be left to the mercy, desire, or wishes of litigants. No case for transfer is made out; hence, the instant Civil Transfer Application is dismissed in limine along with listed application. JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
